assertions.assertion: Creates a ClaimsPrincipal with a ClaimsIdentity containing a birthdate claim
assertions.rationale: Both tests create ClaimsPrincipal with ClaimsIdentity containing new Claim("birthdate", ...).

assertions.assertion: Constructs an AuthorizationHandlerContext with the requirement, user principal, and resource
assertions.rationale: new AuthorizationHandlerContext([requirement], user, resource: null) in both tests.

assertions.assertion: Calls HandleAsync on the handler directly
Asserts context.HasSucceeded is true for a user meeting the age requirement
Asserts context.HasSucceeded is false for a user not meeting the age requirement
assertions.rationale: Assert.False(context.HasSucceeded) for the user born 10 years ago.
